title: Migrate logging to tracing
body:
## Summary

Drops `log` + `env_logger` in favor of `tracing` + `tracing-subscriber`.
Unifies our request logging with the new structured output the SRE team wants
for the central log pipeline.

## Test plan

- [x] All existing log lines still emit
- [x] Span context propagates through the async boundary
- [ ] Verify Datadog ingestion in staging
